model_derivation_policy.authority_rule: JSON Schema remains the source of truth; Python models may be generated, schema-derived, or explicitly classified as runtime-owned implementation details.
model_derivation_policy.first_schema_derived_target: workspace_local_override.schema.json -> MixedAgentLocalOverride replacement or generated validator facade
model_derivation_policy.handwritten_model_boundary: Handwritten dataclasses remain acceptable when they represent runtime execution state, live repo inspection, or adapted third-party package results rather than reusable contract shape.
